description_long: This is a red, cylindrical foam fire extinguisher with a black base and a prominent red handle and lever mechanism at the top. The front features a large, rectangular label with white and yellow instructional text and pictograms, as well as a brand label reading 'FLAMECHAP.' A black discharge hose is attached to the side, curving from the top to the lower body, and is secured by a bracket. The top of the extinguisher includes a safety pin and a metal ring for tamper evidence. The surface is smooth and glossy, with the main body made of metal and the base likely reinforced for stability. The extinguisher is designed for emergency use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or public buildings.
description: A red, cylindrical foam fire extinguisher with a black base, red handle, instructional label, and a black discharge hose attached to the side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instructional label, brand name, red handle, and the black discharge hose attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain red back, the top handle, and the safety pin, with no visible label or hose details.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, black base, and the full length of the black discharge hose curving down the side.
description_view_3: Back view with the handle and safety pin visible, the hose running vertically along the body, and a partial view of the label's edge.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large rectangular label on the front with white and yellow text and pictograms, plus a brand label 'FLAMECHAP' in white on red background.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black bracket secures the hose to the side of the extinguisher body.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached to the top and runs down the side, secured by a bracket; the hose is medium length and flexible.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metal safety pin with a circular ring is visible at the top near the handle.
